subcodes.title: Tablet of the Hair 8
subcodes.first_line: My hair is My Veil whereby I conceal My Beauty, that haply the eyes of the non-believers among My servants may not fall upon it.
subcodes.first_line_orig: شعری شعاری به استر جمالی لئلا تقع علیه عیون الاغیار من عبادی کذالک نستر عن
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
